final_prompt.prompt:
Generate an original, non-infringing screenshot of a Douyin live stream featuring a female streamer called 神仙姐姐.

Style/medium: mobile UI screenshot, Douyin live interface mockup, clean digital interface
Composition: 9:16 vertical aspect ratio, full-screen mobile view, streamer centered in frame with live chat and interaction buttons visible at bottom
Subject: female streamer 神仙姐姐 holding a sign/board in her hands, elegant appearance, engaging expression, positioned in upper-middle of frame
Scene/backdrop: typical live streaming room interior with soft decorative background, ring light reflection visible
Lighting/mood: soft diffused ring light on streamer's face, warm and inviting atmosphere suitable for casual chatting
Text (verbatim): "今晚直播，欢迎来参亦菲畅聊！"
Constraints: UI elements must resemble actual Douyin live interface including viewer count, gift buttons, comment section; text on sign must be clearly readable
Avoid: blurry text, distorted facial features, cluttered interface, watermark from other platforms, overly dramatic lighting
